segments.text: We were waiting for Srila Prabhupada, we were having kirtan, and then suddenly Prabhupada
He was like a genie out of the lamp, I guess.
No, it wasn't only me, because I was with Roberto Nanda and he was there chanting and
playing the dunga, and he also said, Prabhupada, he just suddenly said, Prabhupada, he just
And Prabhupada was just standing there, very aristocratic, and then he was just looking
at all the devotees there, one after another, and then he looked at me, the new bhakti,
and then he just looked straight through me.
And as if to say, you know, I'm looking for you, I'm coming for you, not what you think
you are, all these identities you have, I'm seeing you as Krishna's devotee, I'm coming
And I was thinking that, you know, I'm standing here in Kolkata airport, I'm completely naked,
the whole world is watching me, I've got nothing to hide from this man, he's seeing me.
Everybody had a garland to give, they went forward and offered their garlands, so I went
forward to offer my garland also, and I had a little brass bowl with rose petals, and
they said, when Prabhupada comes, you should throw these petals before him.
Anyway I went and I offered the garland to Prabhupada, and the little bowl I still had
in my hand, it just touched Prabhupada here, and it made a little ringing sound, but I
At that time, in his eyes, I was looking at his eyes, but it didn't even blink, you
know, when something comes close to your eyes, so what to speak of touching your eyes, but
Prabhupada, it didn't blink, it didn't even waver, and I thought, wow, this person is
completely peaceful, completely tranquil, you know.
My ideas of spiritual life was, you know, that complete peace, harmony, you walk into
the water, no ripples coming out, and things like that.
Prabhupada, you know, what I'm looking for, what I'm aspiring for, what I think is spiritual,
Prabhupada's got it, he's got what I was searching for, and a lot of other devotees had that
same experience when I spoke to them.
What they were looking for, they saw it in Prabhupada.
I don't think it was Prabhupada manifesting it, but I think Krishna was manifesting it.
Here, what you're looking for, you found in my devotee.
And then I paid my obeisances.
And when I got up, no one was there, I don't know how long I'd been paying my obeisances.
Anyway, by the time we got back to Calcutta, Prabhupada was already in the temple.
He was giving his lecture, a rival address lecture.
So I thought, now I'm going to hear Prabhupada.

kind of heard him say was...
So, do not try to see God.
And I thought, I thought that was what we were supposed to be doing.
We were all out there seeking, and I thought that was the whole idea, we come to look for
I meet the greatest saint I've met so far, and he's saying, do not try to see God.
But then he said, but you act in such a way that God will see you, by a performance of
So that was the first impression of meeting Prabhupada.
